title: RRI Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: The Raman Research Institute (RRI) has officially announced the Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 5 vacancies. As per Advertisement No. 12/2026, eligible candidates possessing M.Sc./M.Tech or B.E./B.Tech qualifications with at least one year of academic research project or industrial work experience in the biophysics field can apply online. Candidates up to 45 years of age are eligible to apply for this temporary position. The online application process is currently open, and interested applicants can submit their applications on or before 20 June 2026. Direct links to download the offi

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates will be as per Govt. of India rules.

qualification.details: Research Assistant: M.Sc./M.Tech or B.E./B.Tech in any field with at least 1 year of academic research project or industrial work experience in biophysics field.

salary_details.details: Research Assistant: Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA per month

selection_process: Online interview via Zoom or suitable other online platforms
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RRI Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RRI Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Research Assistant post at Raman Research Institute is 20th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted online before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc./M.Tech or B.E./B.Tech degree. Additionally, at least one year of academic research project or industrial work experience in the biophysics field is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Assistant position is 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided to SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Research Assistant position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 31,000/- plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Raman Research Institute is recruiting for a total of 5 temporary Research Assistant positions in the Biophysics Project, Soft Condensed Matter Group.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Research Assistant positions at RRI must be submitted exclusively through the online portal. No other mode of application will be accepted.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the RRI Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for the Research Assistant positions. Candidates are advised to check the official website for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. What documents need to be uploaded with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates must upload PDFs/Images of educational certificates, mark sheets, Curriculum Vitae, Statement of Purpose, a recent passport size photograph, and a signature image.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant position at RRI will involve an online interview conducted via Zoom or other suitable online platforms.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the 'Important Links' section of this article. You can also visit the official RRI website.
